title: Compensatory Services and Intensive Programs: Accelerated Instruction
description: Accelerated instruction outlines how Conroe ISD supports students who do not meet passing standards on state assessments or who are at risk of falling behind grade level. The district uses these programs to provide additional help — such as tutoring, small group instruction, or extended learning time — so students can catch up and stay on track. Parents can expect to be notified when their child is placed in accelerated instruction and informed about the specific support being provided.
